title: Publish HappyTG 0.3.21 installer remote-ref sync release
acceptanceCriteria: All workspace package versions, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/releases/0.3.21.md are aligned at 0.3.21.
The installer remote-ref sync fix from HTG-2026-04-19-installer-remote-ref-sync remains the canonical product evidence for this release.
Fresh release validation passes after the metadata bump.
The release branch is committed, pushed, reviewed through PR, and merged to main.
The guarded GitHub Release workflow publishes v0.3.21 from the latest main HEAD and the release proof bundle is finalized.
